questions.text: Which of the following is a characteristic of chordates?
questions.explanation: Chordates are characterized by presence of notochord, dorsal hollow nerve cord, and pharyngeal gill slits at some stage of life.
Mammals are endothermic (warm-blooded) animals that maintain constant body temperature regardless of environment.

questions.text: The excretory organs in insects are ________.
questions.explanation: Malpighian tubules are the excretory organs in insects. They remove nitrogenous wastes from the hemolymph.

questions.text: Give two examples of oviparous animals.
questions.explanation: Oviparous animals lay eggs. Examples include birds, reptiles, most fish, and amphibians.
